## Summary
Briefly describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue
(`Fixes #123`).

## Changes
- Bullet list of the concrete code, doc, or config changes.

## Test plan
- [ ] `dotnet build` succeeds
- [ ] `dotnet test` — all tests pass locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests cover the change
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / relevant `plugin/skills/*/SKILL.md` if tool surface changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`

## Notes for reviewers
Anything reviewers should pay particular attention to (tricky logic, perf
implications, follow-up work).
